headline: Eli Lilly (LLY) Faces China Trial Security Probe From U.S. Lawmakers
summary: U.S. lawmakers have opened a national security probe into Eli Lilly's (NYSE:LLY) clinical trial activities in China. The House Select Committee on China is seeking detailed information on trial oversight, data access, and ties to Chinese institutions. Lawmakers have set a July 17 deadline for Eli Lilly to respond with documents and explanations. Eli Lilly is a major global pharmaceutical company with a large portfolio across diabetes, obesity, oncology, immunology, and other therapeutic...

headline: ARTAN Bio Closes $1 Million Seed Round to Advance its tRNA Platform Toward Human Studies
summary: ARTAN Bio, a longevity biotechnology company based in St. Petersburg, Florida, today announced the close of a $1 million seed round led by company co-founder Michael Torres, Ph.D., following his role as Co-Founder and Chief Executive Officer of CrossBridge Bio through its acquisition by Eli Lilly. The financing will support advancement of ARTAN Bio's proprietary mutation-specific codon suppression platform toward first-in-human development.

The financing will support advancement of ARTAN Bio's proprietary mutation-specific codon suppression platform toward first-in-human development.

headline: $100 Invested In Eli Lilly 20 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) has outperformed the market over the past 20 years by 7.2% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 16.46%. Currently, Eli Lilly has a market capitalization of $1.06 trillion.
